3 #include <optional>
4 #include <ruckig/ruckig.hpp>

6 #include "franky/motion/motion.hpp"

8 namespace franky {
9 
13 struct MotionPlannerException : std::runtime_error {
14  using std::runtime_error::runtime_error;
15 };
16 
35 template <typename TargetType>
36 struct Waypoint {
37  TargetType target;
38 
39  RelativeDynamicsFactor relative_dynamics_factor{1.0};
40 
41  std::optional<franka::Duration> minimum_time{std::nullopt};
42 
43  franka::Duration hold_target_duration{0};
44 
45  std::optional<franka::Duration> max_total_duration{std::nullopt};
46 };
47 
58 template <typename ControlSignalType, typename WaypointType, typename TargetType>
59 class WaypointMotion : public Motion<ControlSignalType> {
60  static_assert(
61  std::is_base_of_v<Waypoint<TargetType>, WaypointType>, "WaypointType must inherit from Waypoint<TargetType>");
62 
63  public:
69  explicit WaypointMotion(std::vector<WaypointType> waypoints, bool return_when_finished = true)
70  : waypoints_(std::move(waypoints)), return_when_finished_(return_when_finished), prev_result_() {}
71 
72  [[nodiscard]] const std::vector<WaypointType> &waypoints() const { return waypoints_; }
73 
74  [[nodiscard]] bool return_when_finished() const { return return_when_finished_; }
75 
76  protected:
77  void initImpl(const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<ControlSignalType> &previous_command) override {
78  target_reached_time_ = std::nullopt;
79  waypoint_started_time_ = franka::Duration(0);
80 
81  waypoint_iterator_ = waypoints_.begin();
82  initWaypointMotion(robot_state, previous_command, input_parameter_);
83  if (waypoint_iterator_ != waypoints_.end()) {
84  checkWaypoint(*waypoint_iterator_);
85  setNewWaypoint(robot_state, previous_command, *waypoint_iterator_, input_parameter_);
86  setInputLimits(*waypoint_iterator_, input_parameter_);
87  prev_result_ = ruckig::Result::Working;
88  } else {
89  prev_result_ = ruckig::Result::Finished;
90  }
91  }
92 
93  ControlSignalType nextCommandImpl(
94  const RobotState &robot_state, franka::Duration time_step, franka::Duration rel_time, franka::Duration abs_time,
95  const std::optional<ControlSignalType> &previous_command) override {
96  const auto expected_time_step = franka::Duration(1);
97  if (time_step > expected_time_step) {
98  // In this case, we missed a couple of steps for some reason. Hence,
99  // extrapolate the way the robot does if it does not receive data
100  // (constant acceleration model). See
101  // https://frankaemika.github.io/docs/libfranka.html#under-the-hood
102  extrapolateMotion(robot_state, time_step - expected_time_step, input_parameter_, output_parameter_);
103  output_parameter_.pass_to_input(input_parameter_);
104  }
105 
106  auto max_time_reached = false;
107  if (waypoint_iterator_ != waypoints_.end() && waypoint_iterator_->max_total_duration.has_value()) {
108  max_time_reached = rel_time - waypoint_started_time_ >= waypoint_iterator_->max_total_duration.value();
109  }
110 
111  if (prev_result_ == ruckig::Finished || max_time_reached) {
112  if (!target_reached_time_.has_value()) {
113  target_reached_time_ = rel_time;
114  }
115  if (waypoint_iterator_ != waypoints_.end()) {
116  auto hold_target_duration = waypoint_iterator_->hold_target_duration;
117  if (waypoint_iterator_ + 1 == waypoints_.end()) {
118  // Allow cooldown of motion, so that the low-pass filter has time to
119  // adjust to target values
120  hold_target_duration = std::max(hold_target_duration, franka::Duration(10));
121  }
122  if (rel_time - target_reached_time_.value() >= hold_target_duration || max_time_reached) {
123  target_reached_time_ = std::nullopt;
124  ++waypoint_iterator_;
125  if (waypoint_iterator_ != waypoints_.end()) {
126  checkWaypoint(*waypoint_iterator_);
127  setNewWaypoint(robot_state, previous_command, *waypoint_iterator_, input_parameter_);
128  setInputLimits(*waypoint_iterator_, input_parameter_);
129  waypoint_started_time_ = rel_time;
130  }
131  }
132  }
133  if (waypoint_iterator_ == waypoints_.end()) {
134  auto command = getControlSignal(robot_state, time_step, previous_command, input_parameter_);
135  if (!return_when_finished_) return command;
136  return franka::MotionFinished(command);
137  }
138  }
139 
140  assert(waypoint_iterator_ != waypoints_.end());
141 
142  prev_result_ = trajectory_generator_.update(input_parameter_, output_parameter_);
143  if (prev_result_ == ruckig::Result::Working || prev_result_ == ruckig::Result::Finished) {
144  // This is a workaround to prevent NaNs from popping up. Must be some bug
145  // in ruckig.
146  for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
147  if (!input_parameter_.enabled[i]) {
148  output_parameter_.new_position[i] = 0.0;
149  output_parameter_.new_velocity[i] = 0.0;
150  output_parameter_.new_acceleration[i] = 0.0;
151  }
152  }
153  output_parameter_.pass_to_input(input_parameter_);
154  } else {
155  throw MotionPlannerException("Motion planner failed with error code " + std::to_string(prev_result_));
156  }
157 
158  return getControlSignal(robot_state, time_step, previous_command, input_parameter_);
159  };
160 
161  virtual void initWaypointMotion(
162  const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<ControlSignalType> &previous_command,
163  ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) = 0;
164 
165  virtual void setNewWaypoint(
166  const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<ControlSignalType> &previous_command,
167  const WaypointType &new_waypoint, ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) = 0;
168 
169  virtual void extrapolateMotion(
170  const RobotState &robot_state, const franka::Duration &time_step,
171  const ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter, ruckig::OutputParameter<7> &output_parameter) const = 0;
172 
173  virtual void checkWaypoint(const WaypointType &waypoint) const {}
174 
175  [[nodiscard]] virtual std::tuple<Vector7d, Vector7d, Vector7d> getAbsoluteInputLimits() const = 0;
176 
177  [[nodiscard]] virtual ControlSignalType getControlSignal(
178  const RobotState &robot_state, const franka::Duration &time_step,
179  const std::optional<ControlSignalType> &previous_command, const ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) = 0;
180 
181  virtual void setInputLimits(const WaypointType &waypoint, ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) const = 0;
182 
183  private:
184  std::vector<WaypointType> waypoints_;
185  bool return_when_finished_{true};
186 
187  ruckig::Ruckig<7> trajectory_generator_{Robot::control_rate};
188  ruckig::Result prev_result_;
189  ruckig::InputParameter<7> input_parameter_;
190  ruckig::OutputParameter<7> output_parameter_;
191 
192  typename std::vector<WaypointType>::iterator waypoint_iterator_;
193 
194  std::optional<franka::Duration> target_reached_time_;
195  franka::Duration waypoint_started_time_;
196 };
197 
198 } // namespace franky

franky::WaypointMotion
A motion following multiple waypoints in a time-optimal way. Works with arbitrary initial conditions.
